title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Digital Art Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital artist in Nigeria, and you can't use PayPal to sell your work. You're not alone. Many creators face similar restrictions in countries like Ghana, Pakistan, and Venezuela. If you're looking for a PayPal alternative, you're in the right place. We'll compare your options and reveal the real differences between them. Your digital art deserves to be sold without the hassle of PayPal's restrictions.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are all popular choices for selling digital products. However, they come with strict regulations and restrictions, especially for creators in certain countries. PayPal, for instance, is not available in many countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe requires a business account, which can be a challenge for solo artists. Gumroad has a list of blocked countries, and Payhip has a similar restriction. Meanwhile, NOWPayments, our payment processor of choice, offers a 300+ coin integration with no KYC or buyer account required.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Stripe's availability map lists 46 supported countries. The rest of the world — including Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Kenya, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, and Tanzania — is simply excluded. There is no appeals process. There is no waitlist. There is no timeline for when Stripe might expand to these markets. Gumroad and Payhip operate within the same conventional financial system, which means they face similar restrictions on payouts to certain regions. When these platforms do support your country nominally, the payout delays, currency conversion fees, and arbitrary holds can make the actual revenue you receive significantly less than what your buyers paid. Crypto-native infrastructure bypasses these layers entirely.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad all charge fees for transactions, which can range from 2.9% + $0.30 to 3.4% + $0.30. Payhip's fees are similar, but NOWPayments offers a flat 1% fee for all transactions. This means you get to keep more of your earnings. With NOWPayments, you can sell your digital art without worrying about surprise fees or complicated payment structures.
PayPal's restrictions are a major obstacle for digital artists in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad all require manual setup and configuration for each sale. Payhip's setup is slightly easier, but still requires some effort. NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers instant automated delivery and payment verification, making it a breeze to sell your digital art. With our Full Stack Bundle, you get everything you need to set up your store and start selling in minutes.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital artist in a restricted country, NOWPayments is the clear choice. With its 300+ coin integration, no KYC, and no buyer account required, it's the perfect solution for selling your digital art without the hassle of PayPal's restrictions. Don't let PayPal's restrictions hold you back – choose NOWPayments and start selling your digital art today.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments offers a flat 1% fee for all transactions, keeping more of your earnings.

Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them.
